title: Skeleton
description: Animated placeholder that reserves content space while loading. Supports presets that replicate the exact footprint of real components to prevent layout shifts.

text.title: Multi-line text
text.desc: Use shape='text' with lines to simulate a paragraph. The last line is automatically shortened.

profile.title: Avatar + text
profile.desc: Typical composition for user lists: circle + two stacked lines.

card.title: Card placeholder
card.desc: Reserves the footprint of a card with image, title and description.

button.title: Button skeleton
button.desc: The button preset respects the height per size to match the real button.

props.shape: Visual preset that defines default height, width and radius. See the interface for all available presets.
props.size: Maps to the real component's size to maintain pixel-parity.
props.radius: Corner radius. circle / avatar always force full.
props.width: Explicit width. Accepts any CSS length.
props.fullWidth: Collapses width to 100% of the container.
props.withLabel: Renders a mini label bar above the shape.
props.lines: For shape="text": number of stacked lines.
